mapper.select: SELECT A.FINAL_STATUS, A.APPROVAL_NO, A.DECLINE_CODE, A.CARD_BIN, A.CARD_LAST4, A.ATTEMPT_SEQ, A.AMOUNT, A.VAN_TRX_ID AS vanTrxId FROM PAYMENT_ATTEMPT A WHERE A.POS_TRX = #{posTrx} AND A.ATTEMPT_SEQ = #{attemptSeq} LIMIT 1;

UPDATE PAYMENT_ATTEMPT SET FINAL_STATUS = #{attempt.finalStatus}, APPROVAL_NO = #{attempt.approvalNo}, DECLINE_CODE = #{attempt.declineCode}, VAN_TRX_ID = #{attempt.vanTrxId}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 and POS_TRX = #{attempt.posTrx} AND ATTEMPT_SEQ = #{attempt.attemptSeq} AND FINAL_STATUS = 'UNKNOWN_TIMEOUT' RETURNING POS_TRX AS posTrx, ATTEMPT_SEQ AS attemptSeq, FINAL_STATUS AS finalStatus, APPROVAL_NO AS approvalNo, DECLINE_CODE AS declineCode, CARD_BIN AS cardBin, CARD_LAST4 AS cardLast4, VAN_TRX_ID AS vanTrxId;
